top_signals.title: G7 finance ministers urge action on economic imbalances, some point to China
top_signals.summary: G7 finance ministers and central bank governors have met in Paris to discuss the fallout from the Iran war and volatility on ​global markets but were light on concrete measures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
